English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
J. Mayone Stycos papers
Stycos, J. Mayone.
21-33-3171
16.3 cubic feet. Also 3 seven drawer filing cabinets
1964-1999. Correspondence, clippings, articles, photographs, reports, brochures, syllabi, notes, teaching materials, diary notes, reviews, speeches, bulletins, memoranda. Personal and professional papers and biographical information about Professor Stycos, sociologist, photographer and professor of sociology. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 2 3 ======= 1 2 3 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4041412
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
J. Parker
Date completed:
October 30, 2002
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, July 2003
Last modified:
RMC Staff, December 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Joseph Mayone Stycos received a B.A. from Princeton University and a Ph.D. from Columbia University. After serving as one of the first Population Council Fellows (1954-55), he came to Cornell in 1957. In 1962, he founded the International Population Program, which he directed until 1992. He also served as Professor of Sociology, and chair of the Department of Sociology and Anthropology (1966-1970), as director of the Latin American Studies Program (1962-1966) and as Professor of Rural Sociology (1988- ). He has authored numerous books and articles on population issues including birth control, fertility, socio-psychological dimensions in husband-wife relations, adolescence, survey research, and population and the environment. Most of his work focused on Latin America, but he also gave attention to Egypt, India, China, Poland, Turkey, and the U.S. Throughout his career, he was an avid photographer, and illustrated a number of his books with photographs taken during the course of his research, including a book of photographs, entitled Children of the Barriada and one entitled Margin of Life, on which he collaborated with Cornell Capa.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Stycos photograph collection includes photos from around the world on a wide range of subjects, plants, people buildings. Includes photographs of China, focusing on images relating to population control programs, taken in 1989. Many photos of Central America, India, Europe, and Upstate New York. Includes photographs of China, focusing on images relating to population control programs, taken in 1989. Also, biographical information about Professor Stycos, correspondence, articles, annual reports, department files, and course material.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Photographs
Boxes 1-9, 12, 15-33, Mapcase
Series II. Correspondence, Publications, Subject Files, and Speeches
Boxes 10-14, Magnetic Tape Recording
Series III. Biographical Information
Box 12
Series IV. Newspaper Clippings
Series V. Grants and Programs
Box 14
Series VI. Audio and Film
Box 32
Cite As:
J. Mayone Stycos papers, #21-33-3171. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
China -- Pictorial works. Latin America -- Population. Journalism -- Latin America. Communication in family planning -- China. Family size -- China. Birth control -- China. New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Rural Sociology Catholic Church. Pope(1963-1978:Paul VI) (Title of work: Humanae vitae..)
4041412 <<<<<<< HEAD Series I. Photographs
Scope and Contents
Items in Boxes 1-9 are framed.Two Shanghai girlsItem 61Little painterItem 81Two old ladies in front of Bao Guang Monastery, SichuanItem 151A monk sweepingItem 162Young men on tractor, SichuanItem 172Family planning worker with pie chartsItem 192Two old men with flagItem 273Posing in front of lotus flowerItem 283Old man with bagItem 293Old man in straw hatItem 304Children washing hands in kindergartenItem 364Eating ice creamItem 374Old man with caneItem 385Two family planning officialsItem 415Poco Loco taking photoItem 425Family planning poster, ChengduItem 96One-child family sculpture, GuangdongItem 106Poco LocoItem 116Little girl playing pianoItem 137Reflection on buildings, ChengduItem 147Performance in KindergartenItem 207Little boys near the Summer PalaceItem 218Old women selling votive candlesItem 228Lehigh Valley Train and BuildingItem None8Family Planning Worker w/ChartsItem 129Grand-parents and childItem 439Publications featuring Stycos photographsVarious1219
Scope and Contents
Various publications, about, authored by, or featuring Stycos photographs. Includes several publications about Latin America.Publications from the exhibition of Stycos photos1220Additional indices to Stycos photograph albums1221
Scope and Contents
Also includes some Photoshopped photos and pictures from Storm King N.Y..Notes and articles on Photoshop1222Slides1223CAPA/JMS L.A. slides box12Miscellaneous slides box12Matted photos15

Mixed photos, matted 11x13, various locations.Signs of Latin America photo box15
Scope and Contents
Various sizes, matted and loose.Photo album St. Lucia 200716Unlabeled photo album16
Scope and Contents
Includes photo of StycosLoose photos16
Scope and Contents
Mostly 11 x 14 prints, many featuring plants.Loose photos in open box16
Scope and Contents
Box says black and white seconds and Central American Faces, but contains color and black and white items of various subjects.Photo album I16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white, largely from the 1970s. Locations include: Lansing N.Y., Brighton England, Twin Glens woods Ithaca, Peru, Port of Spain Trinidad, Digby Nova Scotia, Brazil, Mexico City, Senegal, others.Photo album II16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white. Locations include: Twin Glens Ithaca, pipes, JFK airport, Treman Park, Buenos Aires, New Paltz, Saugerties, Geneva N.Y., Bogota Columbia, Tegucigalpa, Digby Nova Scotia, others.Photo album III16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white. Locations include: Copper canyon, Eiffel Tower Paris France, Lehigh Valley train, Central New York, England, Dunedin Florida, Digby Nova Scotia, Freeville N.Y., Aruba, Cornell Plantations, Mexico, Buenos Aires, others.Photo album IV16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Peru, Havana Cuba, River Po, Guatemala, Twin Glens Ithaca, Sapsucker Woods, Danube River Austria, Merida Mexico, Florida, Cornell, Tappan Zee Bridge New York, Aurora, and others.Photo album V16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Washington D.C., Spain, Malta, Oxaca Mexico, Merida, Mexico City, Twin Glens Ithaca, Cayuga Lake, Cuba, Danube River Austria, others.Photo album VI17
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, mainly black and white, some color. Locations include: Warsaw Poland, Venice Italy, Tompkins County, Costa Rica, Maryland, Buenos Aires Argentina, Geneva Switzerland,Twin Glens Ithaca, Ottawa Canada, Florida, Cornell Plantations, Libe Slope Cornell, Lansing New York,, Digby Canada, Peru, England, others.Photo album VII17
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, color. Locations include: Twin Glens Ithaca, Merida Mexico, Malta, Provence France, Copper canyon, Lake Titicaca, Rome Italy, Havana Cuba, Sapsucker Woods, Poland, London England, others.Photo album VIII19
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 13 x 19, color. Locations include: Sapsucker Woods, Copper Canyon, Cornell Plantations, Danube Austria, Upstate New York, Merida, New Tate Museum, Tompkins County, Lucerne Switzerland, Clifford, New York, Gore Island Senegal. Also a photo of Maria Stycos and one of Sid Vicious graffitiPhoto album IX33
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 17, black and white and color. Locations include: New York State, Zocalo, Mexico City, Nature, Copper Canyon, Tompkins County, Cuba, Hotel Tequendama Columbia, Jamaica Inn Florida, Saugerties New York, and others.Photo album X16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white and color. Locations include: Honduras, Aurora, Syracuse, Freeville, Ithaca, New York, Mexico City, Digby Canada, Warsaw, El Salvador others.Photo album XI27
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, various. Album appears to have been disassembled as it is mostly empty.Matted large format photos18
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 photos.Loose and matted photos19
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger prints. Includes photo of Maria Stycos and son.Matted photos20
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger black and white prints.Matted photos21
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger color prints. Matted for exhibition or sale.Mounted photos22
Scope and Contents
Mostly 18 x 20, mostly color. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition.Mounted photos23
Scope and Contents
Mostly 18 x 20, black and white. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition. Includes exhibit text.Matted and loose photos24
Scope and Contents
Mostly 11 x 14, various subjects.Misc. album, red25
Scope and Contents
8 x 10, color. Index at front. Locations include: Geneva Switzerland, Cuba, Mexico, Warren Hall Cornell, Copper Canyon, Sapsucker Woods, others. Incldues photo of Stycos' shadow, also one of Maria Stycos and son, and a photo of planes from a plane.Flora album, red25
Scope and Contents
Mostly 8 x 10, color photos of plants.Surreal and Spanish Graffiti album25
Scope and Contents
Mostly 8 x 10.High Quality album A25

Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.High Quality album B25

Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.Unlabeled album, blue25
Scope and Contents
Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects, many experimental and Photoshopped photos.Exhibits album25

Folder of material removed from a binder regarding exhibitions of Stycos photographs.China exhibition photos and negatives25
Scope and Contents
Photo box of correspondence, contact sheets, and negatives of Chinese photographsMiscellaneous sleeved photographs25
Scope and Contents
Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.Matted small photos25
Scope and Contents
Small matted photos, mostly of manipulated or abstract imagery.Envelope of small loose photos25
Scope and Contents
Small photos. Includes photo of Maria Stycos with father opera singer Marian Nowakowski in a car, also a photo J. Stycos grandfather, and a self portrait of Stycos and wife Maria.Troy album26
Scope and Contents
Troy, N.Y. photos. Includes photos of cemeteries and of the Troy District Shirt Factory.Joseph album26
Scope and Contents
Many self portraits or photographs of Joseph and familyStays album26

Includes Mexico, Paraguay, Latin America, Peru, BoliviaLondon album26Unlabeled blue album26

Nautre, plants and animal photos.Mexico album26Lviv Ukraine, Storm King New York, Mexico, Provence France, album26Miscellaneous album27

Scope and Contents
Includes work from Princeton and others. Titles include: And Yet a Little While, Mud on the Wall, On Love, On Science and Religion, The Negro Problem Prejudice and Discrimination, Excerpts from a Novel to Be, and others."Unfinished Masterpieces"1940s1213
Scope and Contents
From a folder with the above title. Contains papers by Stycos including some done at Princeton. Titles include, Mysticism a Short Critique, A Psychologist Looks at Latins, And Yet A Little While, Howard,Lecture Notes1940s1214
Scope and Contents
Typed notes possibly from sociology classes attended by Stycos at Princeton.Publications by Stycos from Columbia University194919501215
Scope and Contents
Includes A Conceptual Analysis of Motivation In Men's clothing Behavior October 1949 and Changes in Razor Blade Brands A Study of Consumer Motivations April 1950Correspondence and publications1950s1216
Scope and Contents
Includes letter form the U.S. Ambassador to Haiti, Ernest Bonhomme, about doing research in Haiti. Also a publication titled The Survey Under Unusual Conditions, The Jamaica Human Fertility Investigation by Kurt W. Back and J. Mayone Stycos.Greece files1960s-1970s1217
Scope and Contents
Articles, correspondence, and publications about Greece and Greeks. Includes paper titled Cyprus and the Greco-Turkish Conflict by Steven Stycos, Greek Immigration, Greeks of Ithaca,Miscellaneous correspondence1960s-1970s1218
Scope and Contents
Includes stationary for Stycos Cleaners, various letters, and notes.Publications featuring Stycos photographsVarious1219

Various publications, about, authored by, or featuring Stycos photographs. Scope and Contents
GreekSeries III. Biographical InformationWho's Who in the East127Who's Who in the World and in America128Who's Who in America - Marquis Who's Who, inc.129American Men and Women of Science - The Jaques Cattell Press1210Transcripts from Princeton and Columbia University1211Series IV. Newspaper ClippingsFiled newspaper clippings1964-1969
Scope and Contents
Three seven drawer filing cabinets in the mezzanine, Stimson foyer, contain clippings from various Latin American newspapers concerning population issues including the 1968 Encyclical Humanae Vitae. The clippings are filed by country and then chronologicallySeries V. Grants and ProgramsPopulation multi-media exhibit (Proposal to NSF)2004141Dr. Haitises Proposal Packard Fnd. Also a photo of Maria Stycos and one of Sid Vicious graffitiPhoto album IX33
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 17, black and white and color. Locations include: New York State, Zocalo, Mexico City, Nature, Copper Canyon, Tompkins County, Cuba, Hotel Tequendama Columbia, Jamaica Inn Florida, Saugerties New York, and others.Photo album X16
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, black and white and color. Locations include: Honduras, Aurora, Syracuse, Freeville, Ithaca, New York, Mexico City, Digby Canada, Warsaw, El Salvador others.Photo album XI27
Scope and Contents
Index at front. 11 x 14, various. Album appears to have been disassembled as it is mostly empty.Matted large format photos18
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 photos.Loose and matted photos19
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger prints. Includes photo of Maria Stycos and son.Matted photos20
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger black and white prints.Matted photos21
Scope and Contents
Mostly 13 x 19 or larger color prints. Matted for exhibition or sale.Mounted photos22

Mostly 18 x 20, mostly color. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition.Mounted photos23

Mostly 18 x 20, black and white. Many mounted to foam board for exhibition. Includes exhibit text.Matted and loose photos24
Scope and Contents
Mostly 11 x 14, various subjects.Misc. album, red25
Scope and Contents
8 x 10, color. Index at front. Locations include: Geneva Switzerland, Cuba, Mexico, Warren Hall Cornell, Copper Canyon, Sapsucker Woods, others. Incldues photo of Stycos' shadow, also one of Maria Stycos and son, and a photo of planes from a plane.Flora album, red25

Mostly 8 x 10, color photos of plants.Surreal and Spanish Graffiti album25

Mostly 8 x 10.High Quality album A25

Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.High Quality album B25

Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.Unlabeled album, blue25

Photo box of correspondence, contact sheets, and negatives of Chinese photographsMiscellaneous sleeved photographs25

Mostly 8 x 10, various subjects.Matted small photos25
Scope and Contents
Small matted photos, mostly of manipulated or abstract imagery.Envelope of small loose photos25
Scope and Contents
Small photos. Includes photo of Maria Stycos with father opera singer Marian Nowakowski in a car, also a photo J. Stycos grandfather, and a self portrait of Stycos and wife Maria.Troy album26
Scope and Contents
Troy, N.Y. photos. Includes photos of cemeteries and of the Troy District Shirt Factory.Joseph album26

Many self portraits or photographs of Joseph and familyStays album26

Scope and Contents
Includes work from Princeton and others. Titles include: And Yet a Little While, Mud on the Wall, On Love, On Science and Religion, The Negro Problem Prejudice and Discrimination, Excerpts from a Novel to Be, and others."Unfinished Masterpieces"1940s1213
Scope and Contents
From a folder with the above title. Contains papers by Stycos including some done at Princeton. Titles include, Mysticism a Short Critique, A Psychologist Looks at Latins, And Yet A Little While, Howard,Lecture Notes1940s1214
Scope and Contents
Typed notes possibly from sociology classes attended by Stycos at Princeton.Publications by Stycos from Columbia University194919501215
Scope and Contents
Includes A Conceptual Analysis of Motivation In Men's clothing Behavior October 1949 and Changes in Razor Blade Brands A Study of Consumer Motivations April 1950Correspondence and publications1950s1216
Scope and Contents
Includes letter form the U.S. Ambassador to Haiti, Ernest Bonhomme, about doing research in Haiti. Also a publication titled The Survey Under Unusual Conditions, The Jamaica Human Fertility Investigation by Kurt W. Back and J. Mayone Stycos.Greece files1960s-1970s1217
Scope and Contents
Articles, correspondence, and publications about Greece and Greeks. Includes paper titled Cyprus and the Greco-Turkish Conflict by Steven Stycos, Greek Immigration, Greeks of Ithaca,Miscellaneous correspondence1960s-1970s1218
Scope and Contents
Includes stationary for Stycos Cleaners, various letters, and notes.Publications featuring Stycos photographsVarious1219
Scope and Contents
Various publications, about, authored by, or featuring Stycos photographs. Biographical InformationWho's Who in the East127Who's Who in the World and in America128Who's Who in America - Marquis Who's Who, inc.129American Men and Women of Science - The Jaques Cattell Press1210Transcripts from Princeton and Columbia University1211Series IV. Newspaper ClippingsFiled newspaper clippings1964-1969
Scope and Contents
Three seven drawer filing cabinets in the mezzanine, Stimson foyer, contain clippings from various Latin American newspapers concerning population issues including the 1968 Encyclical Humanae Vitae. The clippings are filed by country and then chronologicallySeries V. Grants and ProgramsPopulation multi-media exhibit (Proposal to NSF)2004141Dr. Haitises Proposal Packard Fnd.
